support_foot.Beginner: The foot you place beside the ball before kicking.
support_foot.Intermediate: Your plant foot — positioned beside the ball at contact.
support_foot.Advanced: Plant foot placement relative to ball contact point.

plant_foot.Beginner: The foot you put on the ground next to the ball.
plant_foot.Intermediate: Your non-kicking foot, placed beside the ball.
plant_foot.Advanced: The stance foot used to stabilise during ball strike.

weak_foot.Beginner: Your less-practised foot — the one you don't usually kick with.

first_touch.Beginner: What you do with the ball the moment it arrives to you.
first_touch.Intermediate: Ball control on the first contact.
first_touch.Advanced: First-touch quality — direction and cushioning under pressure.

instep.Beginner: The top of your foot — the laces area.
instep.Intermediate: The instep — top of your foot over the laces.

valgus_collapse.Beginner: Your knee falling inward when you land or kick.
valgus_collapse.Intermediate: Medial knee collapse — often caused by weak hip muscles.
valgus_collapse.Advanced: Dynamic valgus — address with hip abductor strengthening.

torso_lean.Beginner: How far your upper body is leaning forward or backward.
torso_lean.Intermediate: Upper-body lean angle at the moment of contact.
torso_lean.Advanced: Trunk lean relative to the vertical axis at ball strike.

gait_asymmetry.Beginner: An imbalance between your left and right running steps.
gait_asymmetry.Intermediate: Uneven stride length between your left and right legs.
gait_asymmetry.Advanced: Bilateral gait asymmetry — stride length differential.

follow_through.Beginner: Continuing to swing your leg after kicking the ball.
follow_through.Intermediate: Completing the kicking motion past ball contact.
follow_through.Advanced: Post-contact leg swing arc — affects trajectory and power.

touch_tightness.Beginner: How close you keep the ball to your feet while dribbling.
touch_tightness.Intermediate: How tightly you control the ball while running with it.
touch_tightness.Advanced: Ball-to-foot proximity index during dynamic dribbling.

ground_contact_time.Beginner: How long your foot stays on the ground with each step.
ground_contact_time.Intermediate: Time your foot spends on the ground per stride.
ground_contact_time.Advanced: Ground contact time (GCT) — target < 200 ms for explosive running.

hip_flexor.Beginner: The muscle at the top of your thigh that lifts your leg up.
hip_flexor.Intermediate: Hip flexor — the muscle driving your knee lift.
hip_flexor.Advanced: Hip flexor recruitment during the swing phase.

pressing.Beginner: Running at the player with the ball to win it back quickly.
pressing.Intermediate: Pressuring the ball carrier to force a mistake.
pressing.Advanced: High-intensity press — coordinated team defensive trigger.

plyometrics.Beginner: Explosive jumping and hopping exercises that build power.
plyometrics.Intermediate: Explosive jump training to build fast-twitch power.

centre_of_gravity.Beginner: The point in your body where your balance is centred.
centre_of_gravity.Advanced: Centre of mass displacement during dynamic movement.
